title: The Age of The Sovereignpreneur Has Begun
summary: Jordan Urbs argues that the convergence of Bitcoin and AI enables a new economic actor called the "sovereignpreneur", a solo builder with sovereignty over money, production, and labor. The thesis proposes that Bitcoin provides money sovereignty while AI provides labor leverage, requiring builders to adopt both technologies together to compete effectively in the emerging economy.
